changes: Cover: The additional effect 'increases damage taken to self by 10%' has been added.
Hallowed Ground: Recast time reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Midare Setsugekka: Potency increased from 3,000 to 3,500.
Fire IV: Casting time reduced from 2.3 to 1.8 seconds.
Blizzard IV: Casting time reduced from 2.3 to 1.8 seconds.
The Balance: Duration reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
The Bole: Duration reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
The Ewer: Duration reduced from 30 to 15 seconds; MP recovered increased from 200 to 400.
The Spire: Duration reduced from 30 to 15 seconds; TP recovered increased from 50 to 100.

new_content.name: Heaven-on-High
new_content.description: An ever-changing deep dungeon where players start at level 61 and progress through floors, using separate save data and aetherpool gear.

new_content.name: In the Eye of the Hingan
Deep Dungeon System
new_content.description: Instance-based progression system with separate levels, aetherpool gear, pomanders, and magicite.

new_content.name: The Feast
new_content.description: PvP competitive system currently in pre-season.
